textByHash.0418361b7a6a36a6e7900a9ed3d370fa57f24325: We suffered many losses but we've now managed to trap them in this cave.
textByHash.1d3d6aa7ea7cf9f2b6291503043f6934c4f04fa2: Cleive. Captain Cleive. Captain in the Shayzien Guard and renowned slayer.
textByHash.338202b076570652a39fc846aafb1f2052f19886: Perhaps. I've lost too many men to be able to kill them myself but I'm happy for someone else to do it if I feel they're worthy of the challenge.
textByHash.3f806e3e2d0225e99dd9f5e05b6d44ee9f00a7a5: You'll need to complete the Hard tier of the Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary and have earned the tier five Shayzien helm.
textByHash.8da303b43b6fc3c9004f5f4be16a304615756e1e: You'll need to be favoured by the people of Shayzien. You'll also need to be on a Lizardman Slayer task.
textByHash.9a5898246c6c8ad670b5ff23e960ddd8fc32e505: Hello there. What do you need?
textByHash.bd011c6c7aee202b8a0edd4e01900c69e64688fb: Yes that is possible, however I only show the required technique to those who have proved themselves a friend to Kourend.
textByHash.cf4d3ed8044c1aae85dbf4215fddcf751570b423: We've lost too many men to be able to finish them off but I'm happy for someone else to do it if I feel they're worthy of the challenge.
textByHash.d42ca2d864b53e6c2c60b799c5b812965310562c: We learnt of a group of Lizardman Shamans causing trouble on the surface. I led a taskforce out to drive them back into their lair.
textByHash.e6ed6261b3e663a64f2904e9a4a209c49e68ca2d: Absolutely. I'm part of a great family of slayers. You've probably met a few of them over on the mainland.
textByHash.f33826dd3fa11c74b22b06b18420dd9db0972897: I have already shown you that secret technique.
textByHash.f9688b5d57095060aa4d8d1937f6b14e06e07045: This is one of the lairs of those foul Lizardmen. We've managed to corner these ones so they can't escape.
